_note: First marketing-truths.json in the portfolio. Schema is provisional and will be formalised when Stage 3 (CF enforcement layer) ships. Each entry maps a public product claim to evidence — file:line of code OR pointer to per-product audit doc OR signed-agreement reference. Verdicts: IMPLEMENTED / PARTIAL / STUB / ABSENT. ABSENT or STUB = claim must be DROPPED unless a CF task to build is committed and dated.

product_claims.claim: Building practical AI tools for New Zealand businesses.
evidence_references: See portfolio cards below — multiple shipped products targeting NZ businesses

product_claims.notes: Slight underclaim — MC is shipped to prod with paying trial signups. 'In development' is the safe direction; revisit after MC's own positioning v2 rewrite ships.

product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was labelled 'Live'; recalled 2026-04-30 because product is pre-launch waitlist.

evidence_references: /home/marc/projects/proofonce-website/index.html (TODO at L121: 'wire up to a real backend')
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was labelled 'Live' + described as a current 'Document and identity verification platform' in present tense; recalled 2026-04-30 because no backend exists. Description rewritten to future tense.

product_claims.claim: AI Consulting & Delivery — Contact Us / At Capacity
evidence_references: Marc personally delivers consulting. At-capacity claim is truthful — Marc + Kevin both fully engaged 2026-04-30.
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was labelled 'Available Now'; reframed 2026-04-30 to truthful 'Contact Us / at capacity' framing.

product_claims.claim: An independent Claude Foundations practice exam — Instilligent's own preparation material, not an Anthropic-issued credential. Available globally.
evidence_references: Anthropic-cleanup commit ae16bb1 — Instilligent is NOT an Anthropic Partner. The CCA-F naming was previously framed as if Anthropic-issued.
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was 'Claude Certified Architect — Foundations (CCA-F) Practice Exams, with international learners across multiple countries'. Recalled 2026-04-30: CCA-F naming risk + unverifiable learner-geography claim.

product_claims.reason: Unverifiable. No backend data source for learner geography. Replaced with 'Available globally' (truthful — anyone can buy).

product_claims.claim: Mastering MOSS — Maritime Operator Safety System for NZ commercial maritime
evidence_references: ~/cf-research/marketing-audits/moss-2026-04-30.md (9 of 13 audited claims IMPLEMENTED — voyage/photo/sea-time moved to Roadmap by Mastering-MOSS#1)
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was marked PARTIAL because the product was on Railway prod + in the JSON-LD but missing from visible portfolio cards. Added cards 2026-04-30 with truthful copy mapped 1:1 to MOSS code (MTOP/MTOC builder, vessel + crew registry, checklists, maintenance, safety equipment, hazards, emergency, PWA, Stripe billing). See portfolio_gaps below for tracked roadmap items.

product_claims.claim: Compliance Tooling — building AI-assisted tools that map regulatory obligations to controls and tasks (people still do the compliance work; the tooling keeps the record)
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was 'Compliance Automation — automating regulatory compliance workflows with AI' which overstated automation depth. Recalled 2026-04-30 to match MC positioning v2.

product_claims.claim_NOT_made: Anthropic Partner / Microsoft Partner / AWS Partner / certified credentials
evidence_references: Commit ae16bb1 (founder bio: 'As an Anthropic Claude Partner...' → 'Building on Anthropic's Claude models...')
product_claims.rule: No partner / affiliation / certification claim without a signed agreement on file. See feedback memory: feedback_no_unverified_partner_claims.md

disclaimers_required: CCA-F: Instilligent's own practice exam, not an Anthropic-issued credential.

Modular Compliance: tooling maps legislation to obligations, frameworks, controls and tasks — does not connect to operational systems, monitor transactions, screen activity, or take regulatory action.
open_items: Contact form: shipped Cloudflare Pages Function → Resend in instilligent-website#3 (Resend key plumbed via wrangler 2026-04-30; live once PR merges and Pages redeploys).
Stage 3 enforcement: shipped 2026-04-30 — pre-commit hook + linter + git template-dir installed across all 6 portfolio repos. Drift cron (quarterly re-audit) still pending — single CF task.

portfolio_gaps._note: Cross-portfolio roadmap tracker. Each entry is a feature claim that's currently roadmapped (NOT yet shipped) — every gap that closes here unlocks a new product claim that can move from ROADMAP → IMPLEMENTED in the relevant product's marketing-truths.json. Filed 2026-04-30 to give the next 24-48h of build work explicit targets.
